category_sources: Official FDclone page describes it as a file and directory management tool.
source_facts.description says FDclone is a console-based file manager.
display_name_sources: Official FDclone page title identifies the project as FDclone.
current_curation.display-name is `fdclone`, but official project page uses `FDclone`.
docs_sources: Official FDclone page is the maintained project information and documentation/download surface.
repo_sources: Official FDclone homepage provides project information and releases but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Package source_facts.executables lists `fdsh`; official project materials describe file and directory management in a terminal.
source_facts.description identifies a console-based file manager.
